name: INSTANT CAMERA
author: Sean McCormick
description: For instant-film photographers. A GRAMOFSMACK 3-across grid whose tile aspect you set to match your format (Polaroid, Instax Mini/Wide/Square, or custom) so prints show UNCROPPED — the scanned border is the frame, the skin just adds a drop shadow. Drifting Organized Mayhem tabletop behind a white scrim. Prints on a table, which is exactly what instant photography is.

ic_format.label: Print Format (tile aspect)
ic_format.hint: Sets the tile aspect to match your print so scans show uncropped. The trigram cover is derived automatically (3 wide × 1 tall).

ic_custom_ratio.label: Custom Ratio (width:height)
ic_custom_ratio.hint: Used only when Print Format = Custom. e.g. 79:97 (portrait) or 3:2 (landscape).

ic_bg_mode.label: Background
ic_bg_mode.hint: Organized Mayhem scatters your photos on a slow-drifting table behind the grid. RACETRACK sends those same photos gliding past each other in every direction, depth-layered like Frogger traffic; RAINFALL streaks rain down the glass. Static uses the Treatment background image below. Cycle all rotates through every background on a timer with a 2-second crossfade. Single modes are mutually exclusive — only the chosen engine loads.

ic_cycle_secs.label: Cycle — Seconds Per Background
ic_cycle_secs.hint: Cycle mode only. How long each background holds before the 2-second crossfade to the next. The Static image is included as a stop when you have set a Treatment image below.

ic_scrim.label: White Scrim Opacity
ic_scrim.hint: White layer between the background and the grid. 10% = background bold; 90% = prints float on near-white. PHP-handled → --ic-scrim.

ic_rt_speed.label: Drift Speed
ic_rt_speed.hint: RACETRACK mode only. Slow cruise → full send.

ic_rt_count.label: Drifting Photos
ic_rt_count.hint: How many photos drift across, over the static coverage floor. More = busier traffic; the floor keeps the field gapless either way.

ic_rt_size.label: Photo Size
ic_rt_size.hint: Base print width. Nearer photos scale up from here, farther ones down — the depth layering.

ic_rt_opacity.label: Opacity
ic_rt_opacity.hint: The white scrim above still applies — dial both for taste.

ic_rf_angle.label: Wind Angle
ic_rf_angle.hint: 0 = straight down. Negative leans left, positive leans right.

ic_rf_opacity.label: Rain Opacity
ic_rf_opacity.hint: The white scrim above still applies — dial both for taste.

ic_nav_color.label: Navbar Colour
ic_nav_color.hint: Background colour of the sticky nav bar. PHP-handled → --ic-nav-bg.

ic_nav_opacity.label: Navbar Opacity — Landing
ic_nav_opacity.hint: Landing page only. 0 = fully transparent (the tabletop shows through). Raise it for a solid bar.

ic_nav_opacity_inner.label: Navbar Opacity — Other Pages
ic_nav_opacity_inner.hint: Archive / post / static pages, where content sits under the bar and usually wants it more solid than the landing hero. Leave blank to match the Landing value.

ic_navline_color.label: Nav Line Colour
ic_navline_color.hint: Colour of the nav divider line. PHP-handled → --ic-navline-color.

ic_navline_opacity.label: Nav Line Opacity
ic_navline_opacity.hint: Opacity of the nav divider line. PHP-handled → --ic-navline-opacity.

ic_navline_shadow_size.label: Nav Line Shadow Size
ic_navline_shadow_size.hint: 0 = no shadow. Capped at 3px, always cast down-and-right for consistency.

ic_posts_color.label: Posts Label Colour
ic_posts_color.hint: Colour of the "posts" count word in the profile header. PHP-handled → --posts-color.

ic_panel_color.label: Panel Colour
ic_panel_color.hint: Backing colour behind the content column on every page so it reads over the moving background. PHP-handled → --panel-bg.

ic_panel_opacity.label: Panel Opacity
ic_panel_opacity.hint: 0 = transparent (the tabletop shows straight through). Raise it until text + prints are comfortable to read.

ic_panel_extend.label: Panel Extend (gutters)
ic_panel_extend.hint: How far the panel bleeds out past the content each side. 0 = flush, 100 = 100px gutters.

skin_avatar.label: Profile Avatar
skin_avatar.hint: Square image recommended. Displayed as a circle, ~77px.

ic_glow_color.label: Text Glow Colour
ic_glow_color.hint: Halo behind the profile title, tagline, and bio. Black for a dark halo; white for a light one. PHP-handled → --profile-text-glow.

ic_glow_size.label: Text Glow Size
ic_glow_size.hint: 0 = use the built-in readability halo. Increase for a wider custom halo.

ic_glow_opacity.label: Text Glow Opacity
ic_glow_opacity.hint: Applies to the title + tagline. The bio has its own control below.

ic_nav_glow_color.label: Nav Glow Colour
ic_nav_glow_color.hint: Outer glow behind the menu links (Home / Blogroll / pages). PHP-handled → --nav-text-glow.

ic_bio_glow_color.label: Bio Glow Colour
ic_bio_glow_color.hint: Halo behind the bio text only. PHP-handled → --bio-text-glow.

options.per_carousel: Per Post (each post defines its own style)
options.per_image: Per Image (each photo has its own style)

ic_treatment_mode.label: Background Treatment
ic_treatment_mode.hint: Adds a full-page background behind a centred content card on every page.

ic_treatment_image.label: Treatment Image
ic_treatment_image.hint: Used when Treatment = Background image. Minimum 1920×1080px.

ic_treatment_position.label: Image Anchor (when it overshoots)
ic_treatment_position.hint: Which edge the background image hugs when it is taller than the screen.

ic_treatment_overlay.label: Overlay  (left darkens · right lightens)
ic_treatment_overlay.hint: Centre = none. Drag left to darken the background, right to lighten it.

ic_solo_bg_color.label: Solo Background Colour
ic_solo_bg_color.hint: Backdrop colour behind the photo on the single-post view. PHP-handled → --post-bg.

ic_solo_bg_opacity.label: Solo Background Opacity
ic_solo_bg_opacity.hint: 100 = solid. Lower it to let the drifting tabletop show through behind the print.

ic_bio_color.hint: Colour of the bio paragraph under the profile. Independent of Secondary Text (matches AURORA/PARADE).

gsd_disc_color.label: Dock Circle Colour
gsd_disc_color.hint: Colour of the round dock behind the magnifier. PHP-handled → --gsd-disc-bg.

gsd_disc_opacity.label: Dock Circle Opacity
gsd_disc_opacity.hint: Transparency of the dock circle so it can blend into the background.

gsd_glass_color.label: Dock Magnifier Colour
gsd_glass_color.hint: Colour of the magnifying-glass icon. PHP-handled → --gsd-glass-color.
